200.description: Agent registered and derived token issued

get.description: Requires an authenticated Hades agent token. `persephone_agent_queue_v1` advertises protocol support only; it is not a per-agent permission to mutate data.

200.description: Memory proposal accepted, pending, refused, or conflicted

post.summary: Upload a bounded Hades artifact for a linked workspace

422.description: Request validation failure or an artifact-specific 422 failure. Missing or invalid request fields use Laravel's validation envelope; artifact failures use the bounded artifact error envelope and are rejected before deduplication or persistence. Size-limit failures are separate HTTP 413 responses and are not included in the 422 artifact code enum.

missingRequiredField.summary: A required upload field is missing

value.message: The project id field is required.

project_id: The project id field is required.

malformedGraphContract.summary: The submitted canonical graph contract is malformed

413.description: Artifact payload exceeds the compressed or uncompressed upload limit.

error.message: Artifact exceeds the uncompressed byte limit.

get.summary: Traverse the backend-selected canonical graph projection for one linked workspace
get.description: The workspace binding is the exact source scope. Clients cannot submit or select graph_version; the backend selects the latest verified ready projection. Response graph metadata is additive to the existing Hades traversal envelope.

parameters.name: workspace_binding_id
parameters.description: Linked workspace binding that defines the exact workspace_binding source scope.

200.description: Bounded traversal of the current verified projection

403.description: project_mismatch: the authenticated Hades agent belongs to another project.

404.description: workspace_binding_not_found, graph_scope_not_found, graph_projection_not_ready, graph_projection_rebuild_required, or query_error. A not-ready or pre-adjacency projection is not an empty graph; rebuild-required traversal never falls back to an unbounded query.

409.description: workspace_binding_unlinked: the binding exists but is not linked.

post.summary: Submit an explicit Hades doctor report

get.description: Returns at most 100 oldest-first, non-expired messages for the authenticated target agent. The cursor is an opaque server ULID scoped to the same project and target. A workspace filter returns unbound messages and messages for exactly the authenticated target's active binding. Polling does not mark messages read. Cross-project and wrong-target requests are denied without a foreign-record existence oracle.

200.description: Inbox events and the last returned or input cursor

get.summary: Read Persephone inbox events as a bounded SSE stream
get.description: Uses the exact inbox authorization, validation, expiry, workspace filter, cursor, ordering, and limit semantics. The response is bounded, never an infinite PHP worker: each message is one SSE block with `id`, `event: message`, and one-line JSON data containing exactly the 15-field envelope plus `id`, followed by `event: stop` with `{"reason":"bounded","cursor":...}`. Polling is the fallback transport.

200.description: Bounded SSE response with message blocks followed by a stop block

post.summary: Create a project-scoped Persephone agent message
post.description: Accepts only the strict hades.persephone.agent-message.v1 envelope. Required strings are trimmed and non-blank; nullable identifiers are null or trimmed non-blank strings; expires_at is a future Unix timestamp; payload is a JSON object with at most 128 top-level properties and at most 65,536 bytes after canonical compact sorted UTF-8 encoding. The sender token, project, active target agent, and optional active target binding must all agree. Unknown top-level fields are rejected. A first write returns 201, an identical normalized replay returns 200, and a conflicting normalized envelope with the same project_id and message_id returns 409. The transport stores and returns the envelope without deriving authority from payload fields; legacy hades_persephone_events rows are isolated.

201.description: Message stored for the first time

get.summary: Search Hades evidence packs for a linked workspace

post.summary: Store a Hades evidence pack for source-free diagnosis

get.summary: List bounded wiki page summaries for a linked workspace

200.description: Bounded wiki page summaries and next cursor

post.summary: Create or revise a needs-verification wiki draft

200.description: Existing wiki page revised with needs_verification status

201.description: New wiki draft created with needs_verification status

get.summary: Read one wiki page and its current revision

post.summary: Verify a wiki revision against bounded code evidence

evidence_refs.description: Every evidence reference carries 1-8 agent-authored claim mappings; at most 80 claims are allowed across the complete request.

403.description: The agent is not granted verify_project_wiki for this project

error.message: The verify_project_wiki capability is not enabled for this Hades agent.

Unauthorized.description: Missing, expired, or invalid bearer token

Forbidden.description: Authenticated agent is not allowed to perform this action

PersephoneError.description: Persephone queue authorization, cursor, binding, or idempotency error

artifact.description: For hades.php_graph.v1 and hades.code_graph.v1, graph_contract is additive and the legacy schema name remains valid.

sha256.description: Optional SHA-256 of the recursively key-sorted compact JSON artifact, preserving list order, Unicode, slashes, and zero fractions.

fallback_reason.description: Bounded machine-readable reason. Graphify failures use graphify_failed:<ExceptionClass>; raw exception messages and absolute paths are forbidden.

branch.description: Git branch name accepted by the canonical graph contract. Dot-prefixed or .lock components, consecutive dots or slashes, trailing slash or dot, reflog selectors, backslashes, and control characters are rejected.

version.description: Traversal result version derived from graph_version and bounded query inputs.

graph_version.description: Backend-selected verified projection version; this is response-only.

target_workspace_binding_id.description: Required and non-null for source_slice, source_search, symbol_lookup, git_metadata, and artifact_metadata.

expires_at.description: Unix timestamp strictly in the future.

payload.description: JSON object, including {}, whose canonical compact sorted UTF-8 JSON encoding is at most 65,536 bytes. Nested arrays remain valid.

id.description: Server-generated monotonic ULID used as the opaque cursor.

persephone_agent_queue_v1.description: Protocol support advertisement, not a mutating-task permission.

capability_names.description: Effective names granted to this agent. Wiki verification is allowed only when verify_project_wiki is present; existing tokens are not escalated automatically.
